tasks.label: Fresvik: dev server
tasks.command: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use && npm run dev -- --hostname 0.0.0.0

tasks.label: Fresvik: lint
tasks.command: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use && npm run lint

tasks.label: Fresvik: build
tasks.command: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use && npm run build

tasks.label: Fresvik: check migration assets
tasks.command: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use && npm run check:migration
